title: The Problem Isn't Stress. It's the Life You're Tolerating
description: Stress is not always caused by external demands. Often, it reflects habits, responsibilities, expectations, and situations we have silently accepted over time. This article explores how patterns like constant busyness, people-pleasing, conflict avoidance, and self-neglect can contribute to emotional exhaustion, encouraging readers to recognize what they are truly tolerating.
